## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss challenges and solutions for creating accurate, up-to-date content for Baseten, a technical AI client with high standards.](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Baseten rejected initial content outline, citing outdated information and low quality](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Current AI pipeline struggles with rapidly evolving, highly technical AI topics](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)
  - [Multiple strategies proposed: refine AI pipeline, involve human experts, shift to higher-level content, and explore alternative publishing options](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

## Topics

### Content Accuracy and Recency Challenges

  - [Baseten requires content less than 3-6 months old due to rapid industry changes](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Initial AI-generated outline deemed worse than "college student with Google search"](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [Perplexity and initial pipeline incorrectly validated the outline's accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Difficulty in producing super-accurate technical content highlighted](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=101.0)

### AI Pipeline Improvements

  - [Current pipeline not agentic; new agentic pipeline now in place](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=87.0)
  - [Proposal to add constraints, restriction courses, and expert review to the pipeline](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Option to pass recency parameters (e.g., only content from September forward)](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Exploration of AI watch directory and other data sources for up-to-date information](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=664.0)

### Content Strategy Adjustments

  - [Shift towards high-level, educational, "glossary-style" content](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Focus on decision processes rather than specific model comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
  - [Explore creating a separate website or subdomain for less scrutinized content](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=182.0)
  - [Consider seeding content on platforms like Reddit for AI mentions](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)

### Human Expert Involvement

  - [Necessity of involving domain experts for review and validation](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Challenges in finding affordable, knowledgeable reviewers (e.g., $2000/month part-time)](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Potential candidate identified who has written for vector database companies](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)

### Client Expectations and Relationship

  - [Baseten approved topics but rejected the execution](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Need to align on content creation process and quality checks](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Importance of showing the pipeline and human-in-the-loop processes to build confidence](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Possibility of price renegotiation based on increased complexity](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review Content OS to identify suitable high-level topics](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=551.0)
  - [Create a one-pager outlining multiple options for moving forward](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1305.0)
  - [Refine AI pipeline and document the process for client review](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)
  - [Explore expert reviewers and determine the best fit](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=853.0)
  - [Investigate alternative content distribution channels (e.g., Reddit)](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=1342.0)
  - [Prepare to renegotiate pricing based on new approach](https://fathom.video/share/Z4LbhuCqvFri8puU_VNszd27ZjCE6NLd?tab=summary&timestamp=994.0)
